sous_titres.text: Mere particles of dust in the room changed my ladyboy life forever.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0018_time_270.00s-285.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0019_time_285.00s-300.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0020_time_300.00s-315.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: We offer free repairs within a 14-day period.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0021_time_315.00s-330.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The government is taking dust pollution seriously,
and we're looking for a solution as we speak.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0022_time_330.00s-345.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But you must remember that dust is a necessary evil.
It's not possible to have development without dust.
In the middle of that night,
I heard someone coughing, although I was alone in the house.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0023_time_345.00s-360.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Last time I checked, I still have no husband.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0024_time_360.00s-375.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0025_time_375.00s-390.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The speck of dust and dirt I had vacuumed reappeared on the floor.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0026_time_390.00s-405.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I need to get to the bottom of this, since I'm an academic ladyboy.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0027_time_405.00s-420.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I contacted the call center to claim the 14-day warranty.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0028_time_420.00s-435.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0029_time_435.00s-450.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'm here to fix the vacuum cleaner.
But I rang the call center just now.
So your machine spews out dust by itself?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0030_time_450.00s-465.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Let me have a look at the thing.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0031_time_465.00s-480.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0032_time_480.00s-495.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0033_time_495.00s-510.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0034_time_510.00s-525.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0035_time_525.00s-540.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Is this the panel that used to be at the square?
I took this photo before they moved it.
They're tearing down the shop houses around here to build a new shopping mall.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0036_time_540.00s-555.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: That explains the huge amount of dust.
Will they tear it down as well?
but in the future, who knows?
I heard the landlord might be retaking the street.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0037_time_555.00s-570.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I was taught as a child that this place does not belong to us.
for the day I have to move out.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0038_time_570.00s-585.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Yeah, but I can't do anything.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0039_time_585.00s-600.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Do you live here by yourself?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0040_time_600.00s-615.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Aside from releasing dust at night,

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0041_time_615.00s-630.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0042_time_630.00s-645.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0043_time_645.00s-660.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: that the factory that made these electrical appliances
And the ghosts at the factory possess its products.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0044_time_660.00s-675.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0045_time_675.00s-690.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0046_time_690.00s-705.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0047_time_705.00s-720.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: He died a few hours afterwards.
The bloodstain on the floor could not be removed.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0048_time_720.00s-735.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0049_time_735.00s-750.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0050_time_750.00s-765.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0051_time_765.00s-780.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0052_time_780.00s-795.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The ghost of Tok made frequent appearances at the factory since.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0053_time_795.00s-810.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0054_time_810.00s-825.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0055_time_825.00s-840.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Madam Suman, you've been taking good care of the factory.
It looks just like when your husband was alive.
We're trying to maintain the standard.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0056_time_840.00s-855.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The other day, I did a round at another factory.
The level of dust particles exceeds safety standards.
I had to revoke its license and shut it down.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0057_time_855.00s-870.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0058_time_870.00s-885.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Though the hygiene level passed the standard,

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0059_time_885.00s-900.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0060_time_900.00s-915.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Madam, do you want me to shoot?
Why do you keep harassing us?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0061_time_915.00s-930.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: What are you so mad about?
I did host a funeral for you.
I paid for the noodles at your funeral.
Your weekly poltergeist stunts keep interrupting our work.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0062_time_930.00s-945.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The dead shouldn't mess with the living.
You should move on to your next life.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0063_time_945.00s-960.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: It's not fair to accuse us like that.
We run an ethical operation here.
Your death has nothing to do with the factory.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0064_time_960.00s-975.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Tell everyone to get back to work now.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0065_time_975.00s-990.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0066_time_990.00s-1005.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But you saw that the ghost was playing pranks on us.
A ghost is even less hygienic than a speck of dust.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0067_time_1005.00s-1020.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I have to revoke your license.
What will I do without my factory?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0068_time_1020.00s-1035.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0069_time_1035.00s-1050.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Do you think that ghost is in my machine?
There are many factories where workers have died.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0070_time_1050.00s-1065.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I just got it last week.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0071_time_1065.00s-1080.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The son of Madam had a ghost-wife.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0072_time_1080.00s-1095.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The younger son had been married for four years
But she fell ill with a respiratory disease.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0073_time_1095.00s-1110.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0074_time_1110.00s-1125.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: March, have you asked the monk to come see our factory?
We need to hurry and reopen it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0075_time_1125.00s-1140.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: If we don't talk about it now, there'll be no business to talk about.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0076_time_1140.00s-1155.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Have you seen Aunt Nat in your dream?
Leave your uncle alone. It's been a long day.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0077_time_1155.00s-1170.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I've never seen her in my dream.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0078_time_1170.00s-1185.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: She visited me in my dream.
In the dream she didn't cough at all.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0079_time_1185.00s-1200.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Despite still mourning the loss of his wife,
he had to return to help the family business.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0080_time_1200.00s-1215.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: This spirit bears a violent grudge against you.
Is there anything we can do?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0081_time_1215.00s-1230.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: There are two reasons why the dead return.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0082_time_1230.00s-1245.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But I didn't do anything to him.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0083_time_1245.00s-1260.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: That's not how we use a vacuum cleaner.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0092_time_1380.00s-1395.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0093_time_1395.00s-1410.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: the doctor couldn't find anything unusual.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0094_time_1410.00s-1425.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'm less worried about the fever than...
the fact that he made out with the vacuum cleaner.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0095_time_1425.00s-1440.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: He might have difficulties coping with that.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0096_time_1440.00s-1455.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0097_time_1455.00s-1470.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0098_time_1470.00s-1485.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Ted, did you like the fried durian the other day?
I told you a million times.
Ted is Australian. He speaks English, you know?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0099_time_1485.00s-1500.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: She's asking you about the durian the other day.
She just wanted to show off her Teochew.
outside Thailand, no Chinese speaks Teochew anymore.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\www.UIndex.org    -    A Useful Ghost 2025 SUBFRENCH 1080p WEB x264-FW\interval_0100_time_1500.00s-1515.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Oh, babe, don't have to be mean to your own mother.
